scripts.check:rust: cargo fmt --check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && cargo clippy --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.fix:rust: cargo fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && cargo clippy --fix --allow-dirty --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.check: npm run check:js && npm run check:rust
scripts.fix: npm run fix:js && npm run fix:rust
